articles.title: “It’s Still My View That Solana Is the Fastest Horse in Crypto”, Say CEO of Crypto Hedge Fund Asymmetric
articles.description: In a recent episode of the Wealthion podcast, Joe McCann, the Founder, CEO, and CIO of the crypto hedge fund Asymmetric, sat down with Anthony Scaramucci, the Founder and Co-Managing Partner of global alternative investment firm SkyBridge Capital. Federal Reserve and Global Macro Environment McCann began by sharing his thoughts on the Federal Reserve’s monetary […]

articles.title: ‘Solana Is Really Blowing Out All the Metrics Versus Other Chains Right Now’, Says Real Vision CEO
articles.description: In a recent episode of the Wealthion podcast, Raoul Pal, the CEO and co-founder of Real Vision and Global Macro Investor, joined Anthony Scaramucci for a deep dive into the current state of the markets. Pal shared his perspectives on why recession fears are overblown, why current market volatility should be embraced, and how the […]

articles.title: Charles Hoskinson Puts Up $1 Million to Test Cardano’s Wallet Security
articles.description: Charles Hoskinson, the founder of Cardano, has announced a $1 million challenge to the ADA community.

articles.title: Cardano’s Charles Hoskinson Launches $1 Million Bounty for Lace Paper Wallet
articles.description: Cardano founder Charles Hoskinson has offered a $1 million bounty for anyone who can successfully hack the Lace Paper Wallet. Input Output Global (IOG) introduced the Wallet at the Rare Evo 2024 event. In an August 17 video on X (formerly Twitter), Hoskinson announced that the challenge will remain open until the end of 2024 or until someone claims the bounty by hacking the...

articles.title: Chang Fork Approaching: What’s New for Cardano?
articles.description: TL;DR Imminent Update: Cardano’s Chang hard fork, initially scheduled for July, will be carried out soon. More than 70% of the nodes have adopted version 9.1.0. New Improvements: Chang will strengthen the network’s decentralization, introduce a new constitution for more autonomous governance, and allow users to submit proposals for a treasury of 1 billion ADA. ... Read more
